---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the specification
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-paragraph description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Specification Text

Draft the normative text (using RFC 2119 keywords) that would be added or modified.

## Conformance Impact

- **Affected Conformance Level(s)**: (1-5)
- **New MUST requirements**: (if any)
- **New SHOULD requirements**: (if any)
- **New MAY requirements**: (if any)

## Backward Compatibility

- [ ] This is backward-compatible (no existing contracts change)
- [ ] This is a breaking change (existing contracts are modified)

## Implementation Impact

Estimated effort for existing conforming implementations to adopt this feature.

## Regulatory Impact

Does this feature affect any regulatory overlays (FDA, HIPAA, 21 CFR Part 11)?

## Additional Context

Any references, examples, or related work.
